tool_args.label: LIRR & Metro-North Railroad Key Performance Metrics - December 2025

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAILROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.description: This performance metrics document was prepared for the December 2025 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees.
payload.prepared_for: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

Critical repairs to the Marble Hill Retaining Wall, which supports the Hudson Line tracks along the Hudson River at Marble Hill Station in the Bronx. Full rehabilitation and replacement needed due to timber decay and deterioration. Plan includes repointing joints, replacing loose stones, and replacing the seawall. Construction from waterside using barges.
payload.status: Final design completed October; procurement phase; construction contract expected Q2 2026

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

payload.location: 10.5 acres along Central Avenue South, Bethpage, NY
payload.description: Transformation of a former warehouse and office complex into a centralized headquarters for LIRR Engineering Department Force Account. 82,000-square-foot building with 52,000 sq ft warehouse and 39,300 sq ft office space. Consolidates multiple engineering disciplines under one roof, eliminates rental costs, provides training areas, indoor material storage, and outdoor space.

location_normalized.raw_text: 10.5 acres along Central Avenue South, Bethpage, NY

payload.description: LIRR and Metro-North welcomed the season with the Holiday Lights Trains, festooned with colorful exterior lights and special holiday-themed safety messages at selected stations. The trains run through New Year's.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On November 28, LIRR and Metro-North welcomed the season with the Holiday Lights Trains.

payload.description: New fares and ticketing options take effect on Metro-North, including new Day Pass, buy 10 rides get 1 free, reduced fares for seniors/disabled/Medicare, children 5-17 ride for $1, new one-way ticket rules.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On Sunday, January 4, new fares and ticketing options take effect

payload.description: LIRR cut the ribbon on the new elevator at St. Albans station.

evidence_refs.source_quote: We cut the ribbon on the new elevator at St. Albans in November

payload.description: Governor Hochul announced expanded bus service between Newburgh and Beacon, increasing cross-Hudson trips by over 60%, connecting with 53 trains each weekday.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Governor Hochul announced that beginning on Tuesday, January 2, the Newburgh-Beacon Bridge Shuttle will expand bus service

payload.description: LIRR carried 1.81 million riders the week of September 22nd through the 28th, the highest number of customers in a single week since the pandemic.

evidence_refs.source_quote: We carried 1.81 million riders the week of September 22nd through the 28th

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.description: Metro-North held a full-scale emergency drill at Poughkeepsie Yard, simulating a fire caused by an electric scooter on a train. Crews practiced evacuations, safety protocols, and communication with the Operations Control Center, coordinating with the Poughkeepsie Fire Department and the MTA Police Department.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North held a full-scale emergency drill at Poughkeepsie Yard, simulating a fire caused by an electric scooter on a train

payload.description: LIRR carried 1.81 million riders the week of September 22nd through the 28th, the highest number of customers in a single week since the pandemic.

evidence_refs.source_quote: We carried 1.81 million riders the week of September 22nd through the 28th, the highest number of customers in a single week since the pandemic

payload.description: LIRR hit single-day post-pandemic record with 306,735 riders on Friday September 26.

evidence_refs.source_quote: We also hit our current single-day post pandemic record that Friday the 26th with 306,735 riders

payload.claim_text: Metro-North's new American-made Siemens Charger locomotives joined the fleet on time and on budget, delivering greater horsepower and improved fuel efficiency, while significantly reducing emissions by up to 85%.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad Siemens Charger locomotives

evidence_refs.source_quote: new American-made Siemens Charger locomotives joined our fleet on time and on budget, delivering greater horsepower and improved fuel efficiency, while significantly reducing emissions by up to 85%

payload.claim_text: Phase 1 of the Park Avenue Viaduct was completed 51 months ahead of schedule and $93 million under budget, with no customer delays due to the work.
payload.subject: MTA C&D and Metro-North Railroad

evidence_refs.source_quote: Phase 1 of the Park Avenue Viaduct, which was completed 51 months ahead of schedule and $93 million under budget

payload.claim_text: Metro-North launched an AI-powered Automated Passenger Counting pilot on 18 railcars, achieving 99.8% accuracy.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

evidence_refs.source_quote: launched an AI-powered Automated Passenger Counting pilot on 18 of our railcars, achieving 99.8% accuracy

payload.claim_text: Metro-North is on-track to realize $67 million in savings this year through productivity improvements, metrics, targets, and benchmarks.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

evidence_refs.source_quote: We are improving productivity through clear metrics, targets, and benchmarks are on-track to realize $67 million in savings this year

payload.claim_text: LIRR overall customer satisfaction was up 11% from one year ago, rising to 81%.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

evidence_refs.source_quote: Overall customer satisfaction was up 11% from only one year ago, rising to 81%

payload.claim_text: Metro-North reduced overtime in major maintenance departments by up to 27% compared with the prior year through data analytics and revamped management.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

evidence_refs.source_quote: significantly reducing overtime in major maintenance departments by up to 27% compared with the prior year

tool_args.label: LIRR APTA Gold Award for Rail Security

payload.claim_text: LIRR brought home the APTA Gold Award for Rail Security for its Office of Security's new 'OSCAR' dashboard.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

evidence_refs.source_quote: APTA Gold Award for Rail Security for our Office of Security's new 'OSCAR' dashboard
